# SheetStack — DSA Practice Platform

> SheetStack is a full-stack MERN educational web application for computer science students preparing for technical interviews.

## What it does
- Provides a structured DSA sheet organized into 8 chapters (Arrays, Two Pointers, Stack, Binary Search, Linked Lists, Trees, Graphs, Dynamic Programming)
- Each problem includes difficulty level (Easy/Medium/Hard), company tags, YouTube tutorials, LeetCode links, and theory articles
- Students track completion with checkboxes; progress persists across logins
- Gamification: earn 5 coins per solved problem, 2 coins per correct quiz answer
- Dashboard shows badges, consistency bar chart, and GitHub-style activity calendar
- Built-in JavaScript IDE to run and verify solutions
- Wallet feature to withdraw coins via UPI or donate

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Astro, React, Ant Design
- Backend: Node.js, Express, MongoDB
- Auth: JWT with bcrypt password hashing
- Email: nodemailer for password reset

## Key URLs
- Login: /login
- Dashboard: /
- Topics: /topics
- Wallet: /wallet
- Admin CMS: /admin

## API Base
- REST API at /api (auth, sheet, dashboard, problems, quiz, wallet, admin)
